zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Boothe於大約1395年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德澤爾希德時，她的父親Matthew Boothe27歲，母親Elizabeth de Pilkington I21歲。她於1375年與Henry Thornburgh在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1498年在英國維斯特莫藍德享年104歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Boothe于大约1395年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德澤爾希德时，她的父亲Matthew Boothe27岁，母亲Elizabeth de Pilkington I21岁。她于1375年与Henry Thornburgh在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1498年在英国維斯特莫藍德享年104岁。

nameMeanings.name: Boothe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Booth
meanings: English (northern): topographic or occupational name from Middle English bothe (Old Danish bōth) ‘temporary shelter, such as a covered market stall or a cattle-herdsman's hut’. The latter sense was predominant in the Pennines of Lancashire and Yorkshire, where there were many cattle farms or vaccaries, and whose subdivisions were known as ‘booths’. The principal meaning of the surname there was therefore probably ‘cattle herdsman’, ‘man in charge of a vaccary’, and thus identical with Boothman . Elsewhere it may have denoted a shopkeeper who owned a temporary market stall, but no evidence has been found to confirm this use of the surname. In the British Isles the surname is still more common in northern England, where Scandinavian influence was more marked, and in Scotland, where the word was borrowed into Gaelic as both(an).
History: Robert Booth (1604–72) is mentioned in the colonial records of Exeter, NH, in 1645. He subsequently moved to ME.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Boothe was born about 1395, in Selside, Westmorland, England, her father, Matthew Boothe, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth de Pilkington I, was 21. She married Henry Thornburgh in 1375, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1498, in Westmorland, England, at the age of 104.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Boothe est née environ 1395, à Selside, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Matthew Boothe, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Pilkington I, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Thornburgh en 1375, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1498, à Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 104 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Boothe um 1395 in Selside, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Matthew Boothe 27 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Pilkington I 21. Sie hat 1375 in England Henry Thornburgh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1498 im Alter von 104 Jahren in Westmorland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Boothe è nata il circa 1395 nel Selside, Westmorland, England, sua padre, Matthew Boothe, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Pilkington I, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Henry Thornburgh nel 1375, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1498, nel Westmorland, England, all'età di 104 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Bootheが約1395年にイギリスウエストモーランドセルシドで生まれた時，父Matthew Bootheは27歳，母Elizabeth de Pilkington Iは21歳であった。1375年にイギリスでHenry Thornburghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1498年にイギリスウエストモーランドで104歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Boothe(이)가 대략 1395년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 셀시드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Matthew Boothe(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Pilkington I(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1375년 영국에서 Henry Thornburgh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1498년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 104세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Boothe nasceu aproximadamente 1395, em Selside, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Matthew Boothe, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Pilkington I, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Thornburgh em 1375, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1498, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 104 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Boothe родилась около 1395 г. в местности селсид, вестморланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Matthew Boothe было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Pilkington I, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Thornburgh в 1375 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1498 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 104 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Boothe nació aproximadamente 1395, en Selside, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Matthew Boothe, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Pilkington I, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Henry Thornburgh en 1375, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1498, en Westmorland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 104 años.
